text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh... Fsshhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A gentle breeze swirls by the beach at night, and
the air is awash with the soothing lull of the
waves...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tranquility is far removed from the chaos of
the city. What in the world am I doing here?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It's the... OCEEEAAAN!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey! This is no time to be a zombie,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right! On your feet! The time for you to
awaken has come!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What? Seriously? You don't remember?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
One fateful day, the sky turned black, and all
hope disappeared from the world... or did it?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, the universe has me, the great savior
of the world, Gold Ship, on their side!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've crossed oceans and climbed mountains in
search of Eden, all so I could save the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing the word "Eden" brings back some hazy
memories...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...That's right. It all started a few days ago.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was walking along thinking about the upcoming
Twinkle Series when...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Lend me an ear!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I was digging in a field to investigate the bedrock
when guess what?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I found the Book of Secrets!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"The land of Eden is a utopia that can only be
reached by the Umamusume who wields the
ultimate power..."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"I call on thee, O Gold Ship, to seek out Eden!
Yours truly, the Book of Secrets."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This means I'm the chosen Umamusume, right?
Right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oooh! I'm pumped!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wait, would the real Book of Secrets sign off with
a "yours truly"?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're doubting the veracity of this book?! The
very land of Eden yearns for me! Clearly, you
don't understand how important I am!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to get rough, but you leave me no
choice...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: In you go!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
There, there. You're okay. It's not like I'm gonna
chop you up and make a croquette out of you or
anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I must have been dragged off to this place after
that...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyway. Now that we're here, let's go over what
we have to do.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Say, you wouldn't happen to have a compass on
you, would you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I mean, we lost everything from our phones to our
food while swimming here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So now I don't even know which way home is,
much less Eden.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Not gonna lie—I'm not super pumped about living
the rest of our lives here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: How did things come to this?!
